description: RADOX BODY WASH OXYGEN
ingredients: Water, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Chloride, Fragrance, Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid, Tetrasodium EDTA, Herbal Extract Blend, Maris Sal, CI 42090.
long_description:
Radox Feel Oxygenated Shower Gel cleanses your skin while recharging your batteries with its mood-boosting fragrance. The refreshing scent of grapefruit combined with spicy notes of cedarwood helps awaken your senses, leaving you feeling energised and ready to conquer the day. This body wash goes beyond cleansing to leave your skin feeling hydrated every time you shower. Suitable for daily use, our shower gel rinses off easily, leaving your skin feeling fresh and clean.

From as early as 1908, Radox founders used a unique blend of minerals and herbs to ease the fatigue of weary bodies and minds. From reviving the tired feet of early travellers to helping hardworking people find a moment of solitude and sanctuary, Radox is rooted in the transformative power of mineral therapy. We have a long history of everyday therapy - we call it your daily R&R, Radox Mineral Therapy.

As smell is one of the most important senses, fragrance has the power to lift you when you're down, to awaken you when you rise, to make you sleep, love, create, dream. It has the power to genuinely transform how you feel. There's hardly a mood in society that can't be moved by fragrance. And there's barely a person on Earth who can't be affected by scent. Life's a rollercoaster of emotions, and it can be a challenge to constantly feel the way you want to. That's why Radox's fragrance combinations are specially designed to unleash a mood, whether you want to be energised or refreshed, uplifted or soothed. And that's why we ask each one of you, 'How do you want to feel?'.
  • Radox Feel Oxygenated Shower Gel provides a refreshing shower experience that revives your senses

  • Rinses off easily, leaving an energising grapefruit and cedarwood scent

  • The refreshing scent of this body wash helps you wake up and feel energised

  • Radox shower gel washes away bacteria and makes you feel ready for the day with its mood-changing fragrance

  • This body wash is a perfect alternative to soap and is suitable for daily use

  • Radox shower gel is proudly made in Australia.
name: Feel Oxygenated Shower Gel Body Wash

description: DOVE ESSENTIAL FRUITY NOURISH BODY WASH 400ML
ingredients: Water, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Methyl Lauroyl Taurate, Sodium Cocoyl Isethionate Glycerin, Sodium Chloride, Fragrance, Phenoxyethanol, Carbomer, Coconut Acid, Hydroxystearic Acid, Stearic Acid, Glycol Distearate, Glyceryl Stearate, PPG-7, Citric Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Palmitic Acid, Lauric Acid, Sodium Isethionate, Sodium Methyltaurate, Tetrasodium EDTA, PEG-4 Laurate, PEG-4 Dilaurate, Sodium Carbonate, PEG-4, lodopropynyl Butylcarbamate, PEG-150 Pentaerythrityl Tetrastearate, PPG-2 Hydroxyethyl Cocamide, 12-ketostearic acid, Arachidic Acid, Cl 17200.
long_description:
If you're looking for a body wash that is mild and gentle and cares for your skin, give Dove Fruity Nourish Body Wash a try. Developed with naturally derived cleansers and 0% sulfate SLES, this soap-free moisturising body wash works to cleanse and nourish your skin, leaving it soft and smooth in just one shower.

Our shower gel doesn't strip away your skin's natural moisture, keeping your skin hydrated and soft. It's gentle on your microbiome (your skin's living protective layer) and made with a plant-based moisturiser and moisturising cream, helping you turn every shower into an act of self-care.

Where an ordinary body wash might leave your skin feeling dry, tight and irritated, Dove leaves it feeling soft and cared for before you've even stepped out of the shower. It is also PETA Vegan Approved and comes in a 25% recycled plastic bottle.

Pump a generous amount of Dove Fruity Nourish Body Wash into wet hands, a washcloth or a loofah. Massage all over your body, then rinse off to reveal soft, smooth skin. Your skin is most receptive to lotions and serums when it's slightly damp, making post-shower the perfect time to lock in moisture. Apply your favourite Dove moisturiser as soon as you step out of the shower - your skin will look and feel softer, as well as instantly more nourished.

At Dove, we envision a world where beauty is a source of confidence, not anxiety. Our mission is to help the next generation of women develop a positive relationship with the way they look - reaching over of a billion young people with self-esteem education by 2030.
  • Mild and caring, Dove Fruity Nourish Body Wash gently cleanses and provides nourishment for instantly soft, smooth skin

  • This body cleanser helps your skin retain its natural moisture rather than stripping it away

  • Produces a rich lather that doesn't dry out your skin like ordinary body washes

  • Made with naturally derived gentle cleansers, 0% sulfate SLES and pomegranate juice for a fruity shower experience

  • Featuring a plant-based moisturiser and moisturising cream, our shower gel effectively washes away dirt while nourishing your skin's microbiome

  • This microbiome-gentle body wash is PETA Vegan Approved and packaged in a 25% recycled plastic bottle, so you can feel good about switching to Dove.
name: Essential Fruity Nourish Body Wash

Our shower gel doesn't strip your skin's natural moisture, keeping your skin hydrated and soft. It's gentle on your microbiome (your skin's living protective layer) and made with a plant-based moisturiser and ¼ moisturising cream, helping you turn every shower into an act of self-care.

Where an ordinary body wash might leave your skin feeling dry, tight and irritated, Dove leaves it feeling soft and cared for before you've even stepped out of the shower. It is also PETA Vegan Approved and comes in a 70% recycled plastic bottle.

Pump a generous amount of Dove Gentle Pamper Body Wash into wet hands, a washcloth or a loofah. Massage all over your body, then rinse off to reveal soft, smooth skin. Your skin is most receptive to lotions and serums when it's slightly damp, making post-shower the perfect time to lock in moisture. long_description:
Your body's trying to tell you something. Time to listen. Time to swap press-ups and lunging for lounging in mineral salts. Don't float like a butterfly, sink like a stone into a warm herbal bath for some well-deserved me time. From troubles to bubbles, close your eyes, relax and recover. Radox Muscle Soothe Bath Salts contain a unique blend of concentrated herbal extracts, mineral salts and essential oils to relieve tired muscles and help you indulge in a relaxing bath. To use, pour a generous amount (approximately 2 handfuls) of Radox bath salts under warm running water and allow to fully dissolve before carefully stepping into the bath. As smell is one of the most important senses, fragrance has the power to lift you when you're down, to awaken you when you rise, to make you sleep, love, create, dream. It has the power to genuinely transform how you feel. There's hardly a mood in society that cannot be moved by fragrance. And there's barely a person on Earth who can't be affected by scent. Life's a rollercoaster of emotions, and it can be a challenge to constantly feel the way you want to. That's why Radox's fragrance combinations are specially designed to unleash a mood, whether you want to be energised or refreshed, uplifted or soothed. And that's why we ask each one of you, ‘How do you want to feel?'.
  • Radox Muscle Soothe Bath Salts are a unique blend of concentrated herbal extracts, mineral salts and essential oils

  • Help soothe tired and aching muscles, leaving you feeling relaxed after strenuous activity

  • At Radox, we have been blending mineral bath salts since 1908 to unleash a mood, whether you want to be energised or refreshed, uplifted or soothed

  • Featuring a soothing fragrance, these salts are specially formulated to help you indulge in a relaxing bath experience

  • Soak in a bath with our herbal mineral salts to wash away stresses and clear your mind

  • Simply pour about 2 handfuls of Radox bath salts under warm running water and let them dissolve before stepping into the bath.

Dettol 2in1 Sanitiser Spray kills 99.9% of germs* on hands and surfaces. The antibacterial surface spray comes in a handy, travel sized aerosol so that you can disinfect hands and a wide range of hard surfaces for convenient on the go use! Carry and use anywhere, anytime. description: DOVE BEAUTY BAR SHEA BUTTER 2 X 90G
ingredients: Ingredients: Sodium Cocoyl Isethionate/Sodium Palm Kerneloyl Isethionate*, Stearic Acid, Lauric Acid, Sodium Palmate, Water, Sodium Isethionate, Sodium Stearate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Fragrance, Sodium Palm Kernelate, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Oil, Glycerin, Sodium Chloride, Propylene Glycol, Zinc Oxide, Tetrasodium EDTA, Tetrasodium Etidronate, CI 15985, CI 77891 *used interchangeably.
long_description:
Dove Shea Butter Beauty Cream Bars are infused with a rich blend of nourishing shea butter and warm vanilla scent that leaves your skin feeling silky-smooth and smelling wonderful. Unlike bar soap, they contain 1/4 moisturising cream to nourish your skin with deep moisture as you cleanse.
Say goodbye to dry, dull skin and feel pampered every day.

Our Dove Shea Butter Beauty Bars contain mild cleansers that wash away bacteria without drying out your skin like ordinary soap. Their creamy and soft formula helps protect your skin's moisture with special ingredients like vitamins, minerals and skin-loving nutrients. In short, our beauty bars give your skin exactly what it needs to look healthy and beautiful.

Rub your Dove Shea Butter Beauty Cream Bar between wet hands and smooth the creamy lather over your skin, enjoying the warm scent of shea butter with vanilla, before rinsing away with warm water. Enjoy perfectly pampered skin with our Dove Shea Butter Beauty Cream Bar.

For over a decade, Dove has been working to make beauty a source of confidence, not anxiety. Dove celebrates a new definition of strength: one with care at its centre. Real strength is shown through the care you give to the people that matter - and that includes you. Whether you're looking for a deodorant to keep you feeling fresh and dry all day or you want a body wash to help keep your skin hydrated, Dove products are designed to protect and care for your skin.
  • Dove Shea Butter Beauty Cream Bar is not a soap bar - it's a beauty bar that cleanses, moisturises and nourishes your skin

  • Dove Shea Butter Beauty Cream Bars pamper your skin with warm shea butter and vanilla fragrance for soft, smooth and healthy-looking skin

  • Our sulphate-SLES-free formula leaves your skin perfectly moisturised and hydrated after every use instead of drying it out like ordinary bar soap

  • This beauty bar is pH balanced, dermatologically approved and suitable for daily use on your face, body and hands

  • Our Shea Butter Beauty Bars contain 1/4 moisturising cream to nourish your skin and help retain its natural moisture

  • Dove Shea Butter Beauty Bars are PETA-certified cruelty-free - we don't test on animals anywhere around the world.
name: Beauty Bar Shea Butter 2 X 90g

long_description:
With Lux Magical Spell, enchant those around you long after you're showered with this intoxicating fragranced body wash. Bathe your skin in this fine fragrance inspired by exotic blossoms at the peak of their bloom. Expertly crafted with fragrance pearls of Black Orchid and Juniper Oil. The fragrance is composed by the world's best perfume experts. Indulge daily, pour a drop of this exotic body wash and work into a rich lather. Since 1925, Lux has been bringing the best of beauty - and the pleasure that comes with it - to every woman in the world. Made like the costliest French soap and known as the beauty secret of some of the most glamorous stars - from Elizabeth Taylor, Audrey Hepburn, Marilyn Monroe, to Ashwarya Rai, Katrina Kaif and Shu Qi -our alluring beauty treats delight women in more than 100 countries worldwide every day. Our product philosophy - It's quite simple really: it's all about pleasure. Lux is committed to creating indulgent skin treats women crave to provide an exceptional experience in and out of the shower. We aim to bring the best of beauty to every woman in the world. We infuse our products with fine fragrances crafted by the world's best perfume experts. We craft amazing, state of the art textures, rich in indulgent ingredients, all designed to exceed consumer expectations. Lux is not just a soap that smells good, it's a fine fragrance you can bathe in.

description: DOVE BEAUTY BAR REGULAR 2X 90G
ingredients: Sodium Cocoyl Isethionate/Sodium Palm Kerneloyl Isethionate*, Stearic Acid, Lauric Acid, Sodium Palmate, Water, Sodium Isethionate, Sodium Stearate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Palm Kernelate, Glycerin, Fragrance, Sodium Chloride, Zinc Oxide, Tetrasodium EDTA, Tetrasodium Etidronate, CI 77891 *used interchangeably.
long_description:
Dove Original Beauty Cream Bars leave your skin feeling wonderfully soft and smooth. With 1/4 moisturising cream, they go beyond cleansing, nourishing your skin to give it a healthy-looking radiance. Our Original Beauty Cream Bar also helps protect your skin's natural moisture and washes away bacteria for perfectly clean and supple skin. What's more, it's dermatologically approved, so you can use it every day, even on your face, without worrying about it drying out or irritating your skin.

The secret to beautiful skin is moisture, and no other bar hydrates skin better than Dove. That's because Dove isn't a soap bar, it's a Beauty Bar specially designed by skin care experts. While ordinary soaps can strip your skin of essential nutrients, our Dove Original Beauty Cream Bar has mild cleansers that care for your skin as it cleans.

Rub your Dove Original Beauty Cream Bar between your hands to create a lather and smooth the foam over your skin, massaging gently. Then, simply rinse off the foam with warm water.

For over a decade, Dove has been working to make beauty a source of confidence, not anxiety. Dove celebrates a new definition of strength: one with care at its centre. Real strength is shown through the care you give to the people that matter - and that includes you. Whether you're looking for a deodorant to keep you feeling fresh and dry all day or you want a body wash to help keep your skin hydrated, Dove products are designed to protect and care for your skin.
  • Dove Original Beauty Cream Bar is not a soap bar - it's a beauty bar that cleanses, moisturises and nourishes your skin

  • Dove Original Beauty Cream Bars provide gentle cleansing for soft, smooth and healthy-looking skin

  • Our sulphate-SLES-free formula leaves your skin wonderfully supple after every use instead of drying it out like ordinary bar soap

  • This beauty bar is dermatologically approved and suitable for daily use on your face, body and hands

  • Our Original Beauty Bars contain 1/4 moisturising cream to nourish your skin and help retain its natural moisture

  • Dove's classic moisturising formula for supple skin after use.
name: Beauty Bar Regular 2x90g

This beauty bar is fragrance free and gives you truly mild cleansing that leaves sensitive skin feeling soft and smooth. It combines classic Dove cleansers with 1/4 moisturising cream to create the perfect hypoallergenic bar for sensitive skin - cleansing, moisturising and nourishing your skin for a supple, wonderfully clean feel.

The Dove Sensitive Beauty Cream Bar helps protect your skin's natural moisture while washing away bacteria. It's also mild enough to use every day, even on your face, without worrying about it drying out or irritating your skin. That's because it is not a soap bar; it's a Dove beauty bar, specially designed by skin care experts to be unscented, hypoallergenic and gentle for sensitive skin.

Rub the beauty bar between your hands to create a lather and smooth the foam over your skin, massaging gently. Then, rinse off the foam with warm water. Get the gentle skin care for sensitive skin that you deserve - try the Dove Sensitive Beauty Cream Bar.

For over a decade, Dove has been working to make beauty a source of confidence, not anxiety. Dove celebrates a new definition of strength: one with care at its core. You show real strength in the care you give to the people that matter, including you. Whether you're looking for a deodorant to keep you feeling fresh and dry all day or a body wash to help keep your skin hydrated, Dove products are designed to protect and care for your skin.

description: DOVE BEAUTY BAR REGULAR 4 X 90G
ingredients: Sodium Cocoyl Isethionate/Sodium Palm Kerneloyl Isethionate*, Stearic Acid, Lauric Acid, Sodium Palmate, Water, Sodium Isethionate, Sodium Stearate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Palm Kernelate, Glycerin, Fragrance, Sodium Chloride, Zinc Oxide, Tetrasodium EDTA, Tetrasodium Etidronate, CI 77891 *used interchangeably.
long_description:
For skin that's soft, smooth and radiant, turn to the Dove Original Beauty Cream Bar. With moisturising cream, it goes beyond cleansing, nourishing as it washes away the day. That's because Dove isn't a soap bar, it's a beauty bar. While ordinary bar soaps can strip your skin of essential nutrients, Dove Beauty Bar combines a gentle, sulphate-SLES-free and paraben-free formula with moisturising ingredients to nourish your skin and to help retain its natural moisture, rather than stripping it away. Dermatologically approved and pH balanced, this beauty bar is so mild and caring, it can be used as a gentle cleanser for your face, as well as to clean your body and hands. Where a regular soap might leave your skin feeling dry, tight and irritated, Dove leaves your skin soft, smooth, and healthy-looking after use. Rub the Dove Original Beauty Bar between your hands and spread the rich, creamy lather over your entire body before rinsing away with warm water and enjoying soft, clean skin. Dove has a full range of beauty cream bars to suit every need, including Dove Sensitive, a hypoallergenic fragrance-free bar that's gentle enough for easily irritated skin. Choose our Shea Butter Beauty Bar for a touch of pampering, treat your senses to the revitalising scent of Dove Cucumber or try our Exfoliating Bar for gentle exfoliation. Globally, Dove does not test on animals and is certified Cruelty-Free by PETA.
  • Dove Original is not a soap bar, it's a beauty cream bar

  • This gentle cleansing bar leaves your skin soft, smooth, and healthy-looking

  • Dove's classic moisturising formula for supple skin after use

  • Dermatologically approved beauty bar that's suitable for daily use on the face, body and hands

  • Made with moisturising cream to nourish your skin and to help retain its natural moisture

  • Containing mild cleansers, the sulphate-SLES-free formula doesn't dry out your skin like ordinary bar soap.
name: Beauty Bar Regular 4 X 90g

long_description:
Vaseline Intensive Care Cocoa Glow Lotion moisturises skin for a beautiful, radiant glow. Made with pure cocoa butter and ultra-hydrating lipids, this body moisturiser for dry skin helps keep your skin looking healthy and hydrated - for a difference you can feel. Daily exposure to environmental triggers (like wind, lack of humidity and sun) can cause your skin's natural moisture barrier to break down, allowing water to escape the skin. But the ultra-hydrating lipids in our Cocoa Glow lotion fortify the skin barrier and replenish moisture to allow your skin's natural barrier to recover. Vaseline Intensive Care Cocoa Glow Lotion is clinically tested to provide 90% more moisture (vs untreated skin). It absorbs fast without leaving any residue or greasy feel. What's more, it provides 48 hours of moisture for the nourishing care your skin craves. Use this dermatologist-tested body lotion daily on dry and rough skin for stronger, noticeably healthier-looking skin. Simply apply to your skin, preferably after a shower, for long-lasting moisture. This Vaseline lotion bottle is made of 50% recycled plastic. Vaseline has a range of moisturisers to help restore, soothe and nourish all skin types. We believe skin care is essential for well-being. That's why Vaseline is working towards giving everybody, everywhere, access to the skin care they need.
  • Vaseline Intensive Care Cocoa Glow Body Lotion is made with pure cocoa butter to moisturise skin for a beautiful, radiant glow

  • Our body lotion for dry skin is formulated with ultra-hydrating lipids that fortify the skin barrier and replenish moisture

  • This body moisturiser for dry and dull skin is clinically tested to provide 90% more moisture vs untreated skin

  • Our fast-acting lotion absorbs quickly to leave your skin moisturised without feeling greasy

  • The perfect body lotion for daily skin care - just apply to your skin for 48h moisture and noticeably healthier-looking skin

  • Vaseline is dedicated to helping everyone get better care for their skin through our global partnership with Direct Relief.

Our body lotion is also made with Hyaluronic Acid and Amino Peptide Complex to boost moisture, provide nourishment and help plump up dehydrated skin. That's why we're working towards giving everybody, everywhere, access to the skin care they need. Visit our website to learn more about our global partnership with Direct Relief.

long_description:
Ready to take your face cleansing routine to a new, skin-boosting level? Meet Simple Kind to SkinMoisturisingFacial Wash. Supercharged with a vitamin-rich formula - this is the same gentle skin care you know and love from Simple - made even more effective for stronger, healthy-looking and smooth skin. With pro vitamin B5, together with vitamin E, this deep cleansing, foaming gel-cream helps skin become more resilient against damage with every wash. Its Pro Amino Acid Technology boosts the levels of strengthening amino acids naturally present in skin, for a hydrated and strong skin barrier against drying elements like pollution. But it doesn't stop there. This face cleanser is also proven to boost skin moisture from the very first wash. You'll love the non-stripping, pH-neutral lather which leaves skin gratifyingly clean and satisfyingly moisturised. And you can count on this face wash to remove traces ofmake-up, dirt and grime - minus that tight, dry skin feeling. 100% soap free and packed with ultra-nourishing ingredients, this daily cleanser is suitable for all skin types and is super gentle - even onsensitive skin. Like allSimpleproducts, our Moisturising Facial Wash is dermatologically tested,non-comedogenic, contains no harsh chemicals that can upset your skin and is free from alcohol, mineral oils, artificial colours and perfume. What's more, thisSimple face washis PETA approved and vegan, with planet-friendly packaging that's made with 25% less plastic vs our previous tube.
  • Deeply cleansing, incredibly moisturising! Simple Kind to Skin Moisturising Facial Wash is a non-stripping daily cleanser that boosts skin moisture from the first wash.

  • Vitamin-rich, creamy cleanser. One wash is all it takes to gently remove traces of make-up, dirt and grime effectively, without stripping your skin.

  • Pro vitamin B5 + vitamin E + pro amino acids = stronger and healthier-looking skin. Our ultimate hydrating facial wash hero.

  • Real people love it. 91% agreed this newly enhanced face wash formula cleanses skin thoroughly.

  • Our kind to planet promise. This face wash is PETA approved vegan, with planet-friendly packaging that's made with 25% less plastic vs our previous tube.

  • Soap free and moisturising. Suitable for all skin types, this hydrating face wash contains no harsh chemicals that can upset your skin, no alcohol, no mineral oils, no artificial colour or perfume..

ingredients: Water, Glycerin, Isopropyl Palmitate, Dihydroxyacetone, Dimethicone, Glycol Stearate, Stearic Acid, PEG 100 Stearate, Palmitic Acid, Hydroxyethyl Acrylate/Sodium Acryloyldimethyl Taurate Copolymer, Glyceryl Stearate, Sodium Hydroxypropyl Starch Phosphate, Dimethiconol, Caprylyl Glycol, Isohexadecane, Cetyl Alcohol, Fragrance, Stearamide AMP, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Triolein, Polysorbate 60, Myristic Acid, Sorbitan Isostearate, Phenoxyethanol, Citric Acid, Tocopherol, Disodium EDTA, Caramel, Maltodextrin, CI 16255, CI 47005.
long_description:
Want to keep your summer radiance for longer, without exposing your skin to the sun?

Bask in Dove Summer Glow Fair to Medium Self-Tan Lotion and treat yourself to that holiday glow all year round. But just how does this gradual tanning lotion give you glowing skin and a natural-looking tan? While the gradual tanning agents in the self-tan lotion build sun-kissed colour, you're moisturising your skin, too.

A multitasking lotion that creates a sun-kissed glow while caring for your skin, this nourishing body lotion is enriched with Ceramide Restoring Serum, a unique blend of ingredients that works with your body to create ceramides which strengthen the skin's barrier and help it to retain more moisture. As a result, your skin is beautifully radiant from 1st use and nourished for 24 hours.

Quickly absorbed, the PETA-certified Vegan lotion hydrates deep down within the stratum corneum and leaves skin feeling soft and moisturised. This moisturising tanning lotion is a subtle and nourishing way to build a natural-looking tan. Simply keep your glow topped up by applying this self-tan lotion every day.

To get the best from this tanning lotion, start by exfoliating your skin, as a smooth surface will help you achieve a more even finish. Massage the lotion evenly over clean, dry skin using circular motions. Before getting dressed, allow the body lotion to absorb into your skin. Once you're finished, remember to wash your hands.

Planning on spending time in the sun? Apply a separate sunscreen product over the top once this lotion has soaked in and your skin is dry. For a sun-kissed look all year round and sumptuously soft skin, reach for this sunshine-in-a-bottle tanning lotion to add a summer glow, whatever the weather.

Dove does not test on animals and all our skin care products are cruelty-free accredited by PETA. Summer Glow is a vegan formulation and Summer Glow bottles are made with 50% recycled plastic. Dove believes no young person should be held back from reaching their full potential. Since 2004, Dove has been building self-esteem and confidence in young people - and by 2030, it will have helped a quarter of a billion young people through its educational programs and resources.
  • Dove Summer Glow Gradual Tan Fair to Medium Body Lotion helps build a gradual tan that gives the skin a natural-looking, sun-kissed radiance from first use

  • This gradual tanning lotion builds a beautiful fair to medium colour

  • Rich yet fast-absorbing, this nourishing self-tan body lotion melts into your skin for a healthy-looking summer glow

  • This moisturising gradual tanner is made with Ceramide Restoring Serum that helps retain more moisture in the skin

  • This tanning lotion provides 24H moisturisation for your skin leaving it beautifully soft and smooth

  • This self-tan lotion, as with all Dove products globally, is not tested on animals. It is PETA-certified vegan and made with a bottle that has 50% recycled plastic..
name: Summer Glow Gradual Self Tanner Body Lotion Fair To Medium

description: ST IVES APRICOT FACIAL SCRUB BLEMISH CONTROL 150ML
ingredients: Water, Juglans Regia (Walnut) Shell Powder, Glyceryl Stearate Se, Glycerin, Zea Mays (Corn) Kernel Meal, Cetearyl Alcohol, Cetyl Alcohol, Triethanolamine, Salicylic Acid, Sodium Lauryl Sulfoacetate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glyceryl Stearate, Peg-100 Stearate, Cetyl Acetate, Sodium Chloride, Titanium Dioxide, Polysorbate 60, Carbomer, Ceteareth-20, Sodium Sulfate, Acetylated Lanolin Alcohol, Fragrance, Prunus Armeniaca (Apricot) Fruit Extract, Propylene Glycol, Benzyl Alcohol, Benzoic Acid, Sorbic Acid, Sodium Benzoate.
long_description:
St Ives captures the secrets of naturally beautiful skin in this deep cleansing formula that gently exfoliates, cleaning pores and helps to stop breakouts before they occur. Apricots are known to contain one of the highest levels of carotenoids (think vitamin A) and super-effective antioxidants. All of this natural power might seem, well, too powerful, but they are actually quite gentle and nourishing, and they help make fresher, more nourished skin beautifully possible. Walnut is known for its hard shell, but when it's ground, it becomes an amazingly effective, all-natural exfoliant ingredient in our facial scrubs. Not only are walnuts plentiful on the planet, they also help newer, healthier skin come to the surface. For best results: Moisten face with water. Dispense product onto fingertips and massage over face. Rinse with water. Avoid direct contact with eyes. In case of contact with eyes, flush thoroughly with water. For best results, use 3 to 4 times per week. St. Ives believes nature has the power to soothe, heal, awaken and energise. Above all, we respect the natural world as a vibrant source of energy and life and are just as committed to bringing you its power. Because we believe in and harness the power of nature, we deliver products that work. We formulate with renewable ingredients whenever possible, and make nature's power work for is - without sacrificing effectiveness.
  • Our apricot face scrub for blemishes, containing salicylic acid, will help you say goodbye to blemishes! This scrub will help prevent breakouts and make your skin glow.

  • Helps stop breakouts before they occur with 2% salicylic acid. This scrub is made to exfoliate and cleanse your pores.

  • Use after face wash and before face toner to nourish your blemish prone skin with the power of walnut shell. Follow with a face moisturiser or face cream.

  • St Ives skin care is globally cruelty-free and PETA certified.

  • St Ives Blemish Control Apricot Facial Scrub is made in Australia, dermatologist tested and non-comodogenic.

  • Crushed walnut shell powder is the gentle-yet-effective secret behind our facial wash. We take pride in ensuring the walnut powder is finely milled and polished..
name: Apricot Facial Scrub Blemish Control

long_description:
Visibly clear, fresh and shine-free skin is just one wash away, thanks to Simple Daily Skin Detox Purifying Gel Facial Wash. Supercharged with a vitamin-rich formula - this is the same gentle care you know and love from Simple - for healthy-looking, smooth and clear skin. 5% witch hazel together with zinc boosts this deep cleansing foaming gel with detoxifying and oil-busting properties. What's more, it's proven to instantly mattify skin from the first wash by gently removing excess oil and pore-clogging impurities while regulating your skin's oil production. Plus, Pro Amino Acid Technology boosts the levels of strengthening amino acids naturally present in skin, for a balanced and strong skin barrier against blemish-causing elements like daily grime and dirt. Like a daily detox in a tube, you'll love this non-stripping, pH-neutral facial cleanser which leaves skin satisfyingly purified and fresh. And you can count on this gentle formula to remove make-up, dirt and grime - minus that uncomfortable, tight feeling. 100% soap free and packed with ultra-caring ingredients, this daily cleanser is suitable for all skin types - even sensitive skin. Like allSimpleproducts, our Purifying GelCleanser for oily skinisdermatologically tested,non-comedogenic, contains no harsh chemicals and is free from alcohol, mineral oils, artificial colours and perfume. What's more, it is PETA approved and vegan, with planet-friendly packaging that's made with 25% less plastic vs our previous tube.
  • Oil-busting, instantly mattifying! Simple Daily Skin Detox Purifying Gel Facial Wash is a non-stripping daily cleanser that leaves skin clear and mattified from the first wash.

  • Detoxifying, foamy skin cleanser. One wash is all it takes to gently remove excess oil and blemish-causing make-up, dirt and grime effectively.

  • 5% witch hazel + zinc + pro amino acids = instantly clear, shine-free, healthy-looking skin. Our ultimate face wash for oily skin.

  • Deep cleanses without stripping your skin. This purifying face wash formula purifies and nourishes with skin-boosting vitamins.

  • Our kind to planet promise. This cleanser is PETA approved vegan, with planet-friendly packaging that's made with 25% less plastic vs our previous tube.

  • Suitable for all skin types, this face cleanser and make-up remover contains no harsh chemicals that can upset your skin, no alcohol, no mineral oils, no artificial colour or perfume..

long_description:
Love make-up, but don't love a drawn-out cleansing routine? Our Simple Kind to Skin Biodegradable Cleansing Wipes deliver instant cleaning power that's both tough on make-up and gentle on your skin. One wipe is all you need to clean a full face, instantly removing waterproof make-up and traces of daily pollution, leaving your skin feeling sparkly clean and fresh. What's more, these cleansing wipes are powered with vitamin B5, vitamin E, and pro amino acids, boosting their skin-loving benefits. All three help to maintain a refreshed, healthy-looking complexion, protecting your skin against nasty pollutants and supporting its natural barrier. For a detailed breakdown of each skin-boosting ingredient, you'll find an easy-to-understand list on the back of the pack. To use, simply remove one sheet from the pack and wipe your face and neck all over to gently lift away everyday grime, impurities, and make-up, holding for a few seconds over any stubborn areas. No need for rubbing. When you're done, dispose of used wipes in the garden compost bin and they'll disappear in just 42 days. Remember, never flush them. Proudly known as UK's No.1 wipes, Simple Wipes stay true to our commitment to responsible and ethical care. Crafted with naturally derived materials, the FSC certified plant-based fibres come from forests that are sustainably managed to maintain biological diversity. All our wipes are biodegradable, dermatologically tested, hypoallergenic, contain no harsh chemicals that can upset skin and are vegan PETA approved.
  • Make it quick. One wipe, with Simple Kind to Skin Biodegradable Cleansing Wipes, is all you need to instantly remove waterproof make-up and daily pollutants for satisfyingly clean and refreshed skin.

  • Refreshing, with no rubbing. Powerful cleansing properties meet skin-loving nutrients like vitamin B5, vitamin E and pro amino acids to soften and protect skin.

  • Made with 100% naturally derived biodegradable and sustainably sourced fibres, our cleansing wipes break down in just 42 days in garden compost.

  • Gentle and effective for all skin types, even sensitive. Our wipes are dermatologically tested, contain no colour, no perfume, and no harsh chemicals that can upset your skin.

  • Kind to skin. Kind to animals. Our Kind to Skin Cleansing Wipes are PETA vegan approved.

  • To use, press wipe onto the face to start breaking down the make-up, then gently wipe, focusing on one area at a time. Rotate and flip wipe as needed..

description: ST IVES APRICOT FACIAL SCRUB FRESH SKIN 150ML
ingredients: Water, Juglans Regia (Walnut) Shell Powder, Glyceryl Stearate, Glycerin, Zea Mays (Corn) Kernel Meal, Cetearyl Alcohol, Cetyl Alcohol, Sodium Lauryl Sulfoacetate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Peg-100 Stearate, Cetyl Acetate, Sodium Chloride, Titanium Dioxide, Polysorbate 60, Sodium Sulfate, Ceteareth-20, Acetylated Lanolin Alcohol, Carbomer, Triethanolamine, Fragrance, Prunus Armeniaca (Apricot) Fruit Extract, Benzyl Alcohol, Benzoic Acid, Sorbic Acid, Sodium Benzoate.
long_description:
St Ives captures the secrets of naturally beautiful skin in this deep cleansing scrub formula that exfoliates, leaving skin smooth and glowing. Apricots are known to contain one of the highest levels of carotenoids (think vitamin A) and super-effective antioxidants, acting as a cleanser for your skin. All of this natural power might seem, well, too powerful, but they are actually quite gentle and hydrating, and they help make fresher, more nourished skin.

Walnut is known for its hard shell, but when it's ground, it becomes an amazingly effective, all-natural exfoliant ingredient in our scrubs. Not only are walnuts plentiful on the planet, they also help newer, healthier skin come to the surface. For best results: Moisten face with water. Dispense product onto fingertips and massage over face. Rinse with water. Avoid direct contact with eyes. In case of contact with eyes, flush thoroughly with water.

For best results, use 3 to 4 times per week after using a face cleanser. St. Ives believes nature has the power to soothe, heal, awaken and energise. Above all, we respect the natural world as a vibrant source of energy and life and are just as committed to bringing you its power as we are preserving its vitality. Because we believe in and harness the power of nature, we deliver products that work.

We formulate with renewable ingredients whenever possible, and make nature's power work for is - without sacrificing effectiveness.
  • An Iconic Australian Face Cleanser made with 100% natural extracts to leave your skin feeling smooth and glowing!

  • Our deep face scrub is made from 100% natural walnut shell powder as well as soft and silky face wash that will give you soft and smooth skin after exfoliating. Skin Care suitable for sensitive skin.

  • Crushed walnut shell powder is the gentle-yet-effective secret behind our facial wash. We take pride in ensuring the walnut powder is finely milled and polished. Made to moisturise and cleanse pores.

  • Directions: squeeze a dime sized amount of the scrub onto your fingertips and massage onto the pores. Spread in small circular motions.

  • St. Ives products are PETA certified globally.

  • Use after face wash or face cleanser and before applying face toner for blemish control. Follow with a moisturising face cream or face moisturiser..
name: Apricot Facial Scrub Fresh Skin

ingredients: Aqua, Cetearyl Isononanoate, Glycerin, Panthenol, Phenoxyethanol, Ceteareth-20, Cetearyl Alcohol, Glyceryl Stearate, Sodium Citrate, Ceteareth-12, Benzoic Acid, Citric Acid, Dehydroacetic Acid, Disodium EDTA, Pantolactone, Tocopheryl Acetate.
long_description:
Love make-up, but don't love a drawn-out cleansing routine? Our Simple Kind to Skin Biodegradable Cleansing Wipes deliver instant cleaning power that's both tough on make-up and gentle on your skin. One wipe is all you need to clean a full face, instantly removing waterproof make-up and traces of daily pollution, leaving your skin feeling sparkly clean and fresh. What's more, these cleansing wipes are powered with vitamin B5, vitamin E, and pro amino acids, boosting their skin-loving benefits. All three help to maintain a refreshed, healthy-looking complexion, protecting your skin against nasty pollutants and supporting its natural barrier. For a detailed breakdown of each skin-boosting ingredient, you'll find an easy-to-understand list on the back of the pack. To use, simply remove one sheet from the pack and wipe your face and neck all over to gently lift away everyday grime, impurities, and make-up, holding for a few seconds over any stubborn areas. No need for rubbing. When you're done, dispose of used wipes in the garden compost bin and they'll disappear in just 42 days. Remember, never flush them. Proudly known as UK's No.1 wipes, Simple Wipes stay true to our commitment to responsible and ethical care. Crafted with naturally derived materials, the FSC certified plant-based fibres come from forests that are sustainably managed to maintain biological diversity. All our wipes are biodegradable, dermatologically tested, hypoallergenic, contain no harsh chemicals that can upset skin and are vegan PETA approved.
  • Make it quick. One wipe, with Simple Kind to Skin Biodegradable Cleansing Wipes, is all you need to instantly remove waterproof make-up and daily pollutants for satisfyingly clean and refreshed skin.

  • Refreshing, with no rubbing. Powerful cleansing properties meet skin-loving nutrients like vitamin B5, vitamin E and pro amino acids to soften and protect skin.

  • Made with 100% naturally derived biodegradable and sustainably sourced fibres, our cleansing wipes break down in just 42 days in garden compost.

Collagen, Green Tea, Aloe Vera and Vitamins A & E help target five eye-area agers: the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, loss of elasticity and firmness, puffiness, dark circles and dryness. An intensive under eye treatment that helps reduce the visible signs of ageing.

Clinically proven to;

-       Reduce number of wrinkles by 13%
-       Reduce wrinkle size by 12%
-       Reduce under eye puffiness

Independent Study, Instrumental test of skin using Primos 3D Lite, 22 participants, 30 minutes after use. Independent Consumer Questionnaire, 22 participants, 30 minutes after use.

Skin Republic is a multiple award-winning skin care range combining the latest advances in skin care with nature's restorative properties. Scientifically formulated and dermatologist tested, our range of products focuses on skin care for the face, under the eyes, neck and decolletage, hands, and feet. Concentrated nutrient rich ingredients nourish, rejuvenate and hydrate, helping you to maintain healthy looking, glowing skin. Founded on the belief that everyone has the right to beautiful looking skin and our uncompromising commitment to quality we offer innovative products developed in South Korea, dubbed by industry experts as the world's new skin care superpower.

long_description:
Your secret weapon to help fade dark spots. Skin Control's Dark Spot Fade Patch is made of over 170 dissolving microscopic darts, packed with active ingredients to help even skin tone and fade hyperpigmentation. The micro darts sink into the top layer of your skin, gently infusing Niacinamide, Vitamin C, Kojic and Hyaluronic Acids to the affected area. This unique combo of ingredients starts working overnight to reduce redness and fade post blemish dark spots.

Hero Ingredients.
- Niacinamide: Works to reduce redness associated with breakouts.
- Vitamin C: Also known as ascorbic acid, helps to brighten dark spots, inflammation and protect the skin against free radical damage.
- Kojic Acid: A naturally derived ingredient, containing antimicrobial properties to help protect against bacteria on the skin, as well as lightening and evening out the skin tone.
- Hyaluronic Acid: A naturally occurring molecule helping to moisturise and hydrate pimple-prone complexions.

For best results, wear everynight for 2 weeks or until the dark spot has visibly faded.
  • Microscopic Dissolving Darts.Over 170 dissolving micro darts deliver active ingredients deep into the skin, targeting dark spots.

  • Powerful Active Ingredients.Infuses Niacinamide, Vitamin C, Kojic Acid, and Hyaluronic Acid to fade hyperpigmentation and even skin tone.

  • Overnight Skin Treatment.Works overnight to reduce redness and brighten dark spots, revealing smoother, more even skin.
name: Dark Spot Fade Patches

Hero Ingredients:
Salicylic Acid: A beta-hydroxy acid (BHA) that dissolves oil and removes dead skin.
Tea Tree: An extract of the Melaleuca Alternifolia tree with known antibacterial properties.
Cica: A leafy green herb, also known as Centella Asiatica, is used to soothe and calm the skin.
  • Best for blind, early stage pimples. Over 170 dissolving micro darts deliver active ingredients deep into the skin, targeting under-the-skin spots.

See firmer and smoother skin from day 1 with Olay Ultra Firming Serum. After 1 day, visibly fades pores. After 14 days, visibly reduces deep wrinkles. After 28 days, visibly firms sagging skin.

Transform your skin in 28 days with 3 potent ingredients. PHCA (P Coumaric Acid): Revolutionary antioxidant that helps visibly reduce skin damage down to the epidermis layer. long_description:
L'Oreal Paris Bright Reveal Tinted Fluid SPF 50 Medium, a dermatologist-validated, lightweight formula designed to visibly brighten and even skin tone.DAILY UV PROTECTION IS ESSENTIAL FOR OPTIMAL CORRECTION:Did you know that up to 100% of dark spots are aggravated by UV rays?* Dermatologists emphasise that daily protection is crucial to combat premature aging, including dark spots, wrinkles, and uneven skin tone.*Effect of the sun on visible clinical signs of ageing Caucasian skin, flament & AL, 2013.A POWERFUL ANTI-DARK SPOT PROTECTION:-UV FILTERS: This advanced formula goes beyond basic SPF with broad spectrum SPF 50 to shield skin from damaging UVA and UVB rays and is infused with Niacinamide to visibly correct dark spots and prevent future dark spots.-3% NIANCINMIDE: Tinted coverage to cover and correct, even tone and illuminate skin.-4% [PIGMENTS + PEARLS]: A brightening ingredient that helps reduce the appearance of dark spots. IN A GLOWING TEXTURE MADE FOR EVERYDAY:The lightweight, tinted formula provides seamless coverage of imperfections for a flawless, natural-looking finish without clogging pores, making it ideal for sensitive skin.SCIENTIFICALLY-PROVEN EFFICACY**:IN 1 USE: Skin looks perfected, even toned, glowy and more radiant.IN 1 MONTH: Dark spots are visibly faded. Skin feels smoother and look younger. **Cosmeto-clinical, clinical scoring, 4 weeks, 42 subjects and self-assessment evaluation, 4 weeks, 79 subjects.Complete your dark spot skincare routine with our Bright Reveal Spot-Fading Cleanser, Bright Reveal serum, Bright Reveal Exfoliant Peel and Bright Reveal SPF 15 Day Cream.
  • This advanced formula, enriched with 3% Niacinamide and light-reflecting pigments and pearls, provides natural-looking tinted coverage that evens out skin tone for a naturally radiant finish, while visibly reducing the appearance of all types of dark spots (post-acne marks, sunspots, age spots). The non-sticky, non-oily, non-comedogenic formula layers seamlessly under makeup. Suitable for all skin tones and types, including sensitive skin.
name: Paris Bright Reveal Tinted Spf 50 Medium Fluid

long_description:
Get back 10 years of bounce and lock in moisture for 5 days with the Revitalift Filler cream SPF15 by L'Oreal Paris. Dermatologically tested, its scientifically proven to reduce the appearance of wrinkles and help keep skin plump. This formula contains a breakthrough technology - the exclusive long-lasting hyaluronic acid that forms a resistant film, able to lock in moisture for 7 days and intensely hydrates your skin, while the formula penetrates deep to fill wrinkles and restores volume from within. Skin is more firm, elastic, moisturised and plump. It also contains 3 types of hyaluronic acid for multi-level penetration and replumping efficacy. UVA/UVB filters in the SPF 15 broad spectrum sunscreen to help protect against UV rays and protect your skin's bounce.
  • Enriched with new Micro-Filler Hyaluronic Acid for a deep replumping efficacy, reducing the appearance of wrinkles.

  • Deeply hydrates, smooths and plumps skin.

  • Get the bounce back of 10 years ago* *Cosmeto-clinical study, 38 women, 5 weeks application

  • UVA/UVB filters in SPF15 to help protect against UV rays and protect your skin's bounce.

  • Suitable for all skin types even sensitive skin.
name: Revitalift Filler Spf 15 Day Moisturiser

This fluid features a powerful duo of ingredients: Q10 and broad-spectrum UV filters, providing an effective defense against wrinkles. With its broad spectrum of UV filters, it shields the skin from both UVA and UVB rays. The formula is designed to be shine-free for 12 hours and is suitable for all skin types, ensuring that everyone can enjoy its unique benefits, which is scientifically proven*. *in vivo anti-wrinkle efficacy study, 40 women, 2024. Active ingredients: Butyl Methoxydibenzoylmethane 47.5mg/g, Bemotrizinol40mg/g,Ethylhexyl Triazone 25mg/g, Phenylbenzimidazole Sulfonic Acid 20mg/g, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate 10mg/g. description: NEUTROGENA VISIBLE REPAIR RETINOL EYE CREAM 15GRAM
ingredients: Water, Pentaerythrityl Tetraethylhexanoate, Glycerin, PPG-15 Stearyl Ether, Dimethicone, Butylene Glycol, Stearyl Alcohol, Cetearyl Alcohol, Ceteareth-20, Isohexadecane, Pentylene Glycol, Dimethicone Crosspolymer, Ethylhexylglycerin, Ammonium Acryloyldimethyltaurate/VP Copolymer, Caprylyl Glycol, Cellulose, Polyacrylamide, 4-t-Butylcyclohexanol, Polyacrylate Crosspolymer-6,Sodium Cocoyl Amino Acids, Chlorphenesin, C13-14 Isoparaffin, Hydrolyzed Myrtus Communis Leaf Extract, BHT, Disodium EDTA, Sodium Hyaluronate, Laureth-7, Ascorbic Acid, Sarcosine, Sodium Hydroxide, Polysorbate 20, Retinol, Magnesium Aspartate, Potassium Aspartate, Portulaca Oleracea Extract, Rosmarinus Officinalis (Rosemary) Leaf Extract, Palmitoyl Tetrapeptide-7, Chrysin
long_description:
Ideal for a beginner retinol user, Neutrogena Visible Repair Retinol Eye Cream is proven to reduce visible signs and skin ageing and damage caused by environmental aggressors, and is formulated with soothing ingredients for less skin irritation, even for new retinol users*.

This lightweight formulation contains
- Pure Retinol, a dermatologist-proven form of Vitamin A that helps to fade the appearance of fine lines, dullness and wrinkles. Our patented technology delivers retinol slowly within skin's surface to help minimise the potential for irritiation.
- Rosemary Peptide Complex, a proven antioxidant to improve radiance around the eye area.
- Comfort Complex, soothing ingredients to minimise skin discomfort.

Clinically proven results
In 1 week:
- Visibly reduce fine lines around the eyes, crow's feet and dark circles.
- Skin around the eye feels hydrated, firmer, smoother and looks more radiant.


*Women who had not used retinol products in the prior 3 months.
  • Ideal for a beginner retinol user

  • Powerful retinol results with less irritation

  • Visibly reduce lines and dark circles in 7 days

  • Clinically tested

  • Suitable for daily use
name: Visible Repair Retinol Eye Cream

long_description:
NIVEA Hydrating Day Cream is a great addition to your daily face care routine. It intensively moisturises for up to 24 hours, thus balancing your skin's own moisture level. The formula with NIVEA Moisture Care Complex, Vitamin E and Lotus Extract refreshes and plumps your skin with fast-absorbing moisture. The cream protects your skin from external stressors whilst the lightweight formula melts into the skin effortlessly. Your skin is deeply moisturised, soft and resilient every day. Your skin looks tired, with signs of fatigue and it needs a relaxing moment? Ready, set, relax! Mask up with our Super Hydrating + De-stressing Sheet Mask to supercharge your skin with a bomb of hydration in just 15 minutes! Infused with the quantity of one bottle of serum and enriched with Hyaluronic Acid and Lavender to de-stress tired skin. - Skin is intensely rehydrated
- Skin appears rested
- Skin looks smoother
After 1 week:
- Signs of fatigue are reduced

- Skin is replumped and more bouncy
Instrumental test - 24 volunteers. Self assessment: 75 women. One single use. After 3 applications per week upon waking up.

All Garnier products are officially approved by Cruelty Free International.
Since 1989, Garnier has been committed to a world without animal testing.

long_description:
Neutrogena Hydro Boost Hyaluronic Acid Nourishing Cream. This rich and soothing nourishing cream is supercharged with skin-friendly ingredients - Hyaluronic Acid, Amino Acids, Electrolytes and Ceramide to deliver 5x more hydration* and help strengthen the skin's moisture barrier. Replenishes dehydrated skin and restores vitality for refreshed, plump, glowing skin. Formulated without fragrance or colouring, this gentle formulation is enriched with Ceramide and other lipids that are naturally occurring in the body, to soothe dry skin.

With 1% Natural Moisturising Factor Complex - Natural Moisturising Factor (NMF) is skin's natural moisturising ingredients that help maintain skin hydration and elasticity. NMF gets depleted with age and exposure to external aggressors. Supercharged with NMF complex that mimics skin's natural hydration for refreshed, plump, glowing skin
- Hyaluronic Acid helps to retain water to the skin for long lasting hydration
- Amino Acids help support and strength skin's moisture barrier
- Electrolytes known to boost ingredient absorption.
- Ceramide and lipids help soother and protect skin's moisture barrier.

Tested with visible results
Immediately:
- 92% agreed skin feels hydrated
- 85% agreed skin feels softer

In 4 weeks:
- 94% agreed skin feels smoother.
- 79% agreed skin feels soothed
- 74% agreed skin feels plump

*compared to untreated control.
  • Rich, soothing hydration

  • Delivers 5x more hydration

  • Helps to strengthen the skin's moisture barrier.

  • Dermatologist tested. Suitable for all skin types. Clinically tested to be suitable for dry and sensitive skin.

  • 100% recyclable outer packaging.
name: Hydro Boost Hyaluronic Acid Nourishing Cream

This lightweight face cream provides all-day hydration, absorbs quickly into the skin and doesn't feel greasy or sticky throughout the day. Paraben and mineral oil free, suitable for sensitive skin. KEY INGREDIENTSCollagen - A natural protein abundantly present in the skin. It provides skin's strength, firmness, and bounce. After 50, the skin's collagen production slows which can lead to loss of volume and sagging.Peptides - Recommended by dermatologists, peptides are the building blocks of collagen and are key for its natural production in the skin. Our collagen peptides, along with the other ingredients in our powerful formula, help to lock in moisture, redensify and retighten skin.Niacinamide - Also known as Vitamin B3, this essential nutrient helps to brighten skin and minimise the visible appearance of age spots. VISIBLE RESULTSAfter 1 use, skin is intensely rehydrated and nourished. After 4 weeks, skin feels stronger, denser and contours appear more toned. Skin appearance more radiant and bright.
  • UVA/UVB Protection

  • Hydrating

  • Helps to reduce the appearance of age spots

long_description:
Vaseline Intensive Care Hand Cream for healthy hands and stronger nails, restores the appearance of very dry hands. Strengthen your nails and soften your hands with this keratin-enriched formula to penetrate into your nails helping to protect hands against moisture loss for hours. Our hands are often the first to suffer from dry skin, taking a battering from the sun, low humidity and harsh cleansers that chip away at the skin's natural barrier. In our Intensive Care Healthy Hands, Nail Strengthening formula, we've packed micro-droplets of Vaseline Jelly with hydrating lipids into a travel-friendly size to give you moisture on the go for very dry hands and help to stop your nails from breaking. Vaseline Petroleum Jelly is the original wonder jelly. Vaseline has long been used to manage symptoms of many severe skin conditions. It literally melts into the skin, flowing into the tiny cracks caused by dryness where moisture is needed most. In this way Vaseline acts as an extremely powerful skin moisturiser to provide a barrier against water loss from already dry skin and help protect against the effects of weather and exposure. Our petroleum jelly is triple-purified to be 100% pure. Vaseline believes that truly healthy skin starts with deep moisture. It's not something you get by masking problems or through quick fixes. We know this because we are the original skin experts. Founded in 1870 by Robert Chesebrough, Vaseline has been safely helping care for skin for over 140 years.
  • Restores the appearance of very dry hands.

  • 10x stronger nails in 2 weeks

  • Contains hydrolysed keratin, hydrating lipids and Vaseline Jelly

  • Hydrating lipids fortify the skin barrier and replenish moisture

  • For best results, use regularly, several times a day. Massage thoroughly on and around nails, cuticles, and into hands.

  • Absorbs fast for a non-greasy feel..

long_description:
DU'IT Tough Hands is a clinically proven, intensive hand cream designed to repair, moisturise, and protect dry, rough, cracked and irritated hands. With visible results in just 1 day, this advanced, multi-action formula works to seal cracks, restore lost oils, smooth rough skin, and strengthen the skin barrier for lasting protection.

Lightweight and non-greasy, DU'IT Tough Hands is suitable for sensitive skin and contains no parabens, mineral oil, petrolatum, lanolin or propylene glycol. Proudly Australian made and owned, it's trusted by thousands as an everyday solution to keep hardworking hands soft, smooth, and healthy.

Why Choose DU'IT Tough Hands?

- Visible results in 1 day

- Australia's #1 hand cream brand (Data on file: Circana Data, Pharmacy & Grocery, Australia)

- Repairs, softens and protects very dry, rough and cracked hands

- Clinically proven & dermatologist recommended

- Non-greasy, fast absorbing formula

- Long-lasting hydration & barrier protection

- Free from parabens, petrolatum, mineral oil, lanolin & propylene glycol

- Proudly Australian made and owned

Key Ingredients

- Urea (10%) - Natural skin conditioner that restores moisture balance, seals cracked skin, and prevents further dryness.

- Vitamin E - Promotes skin healing, replenishes hydration and re-energises stressed skin.

- Natural AHA's - Gently exfoliate to remove dead skin layers and improve skin texture.

- Dimethicone - Creates a protective, non-greasy barrier to lock in moisture and shield against irritants.

- Sodium PCA - Works with Urea to retain water in the skin for long-lasting hydration.

- Lemon Myrtle & Tea Tree - Natural antimicrobials that help soothe minor cuts and mild skin irritations.

Extra Protection for Hardworking Hands

This intensive repair cream not only relieves everyday dryness but also helps protect hands exposed to frequent washing, gloves, harsh chemicals, solvents, adhesives, cleansers, and other irritants. Ideal for tradespeople, healthcare workers, and anyone with hardworking or sensitive skin.

NIVEA MEN Protect & Care Face Wash is here to give your skin superior protection and care. External influences like wind, rain, sun and changing temperatures can be tough on your skin. This face wash is here to help! The formula is made with Aloe Vera and Pro-Vitamin B5 to thoroughly cleanse your skin and protect it from drying out. In addition, the face gel protects your skin's natural barrier, leaving your face feeling refreshed and cared for. The application is simple: Simply apply to your wet face, avoiding the eye and lip area. Afterwards, rinse it off with water. The skin compatibility of the face wash has been dermatologically approved.

  • 5 Directions: apply to your wet face, and gently massage in, avoiding the eye and lip areas. Rinse off with water and apply moisturiser to follow

long_description:
Skincare meets self tan, with a side of fun! We were was sick of slathering on boring gradual tans that left skin dry and irritated. We wanted to create a product that not only gave you a natural-looking glow but also nourished and hydrated your skin at the same time.

Quick Glow is a 2 in 1 formula with the skincare dream team of hydrating glycerin and antioxidants like vitamin E. This luxurious whipped mousse builds a natural glow, whilst soothing and deeply moisturising to leave your skin feeling soft and smooth.

No more heavy, sticky gradual tan formulas, the light and airy texture makes it super easy to apply and absorb fast. And did we mention the fun factor? The whipped cream-like application is a treat for your senses. We hope you can indulge in a little self-care and let Quick Glow become your new glow-to for that natural-looking, radiant glow, all year around.
name: Whipped Gradual Tan Mousse

ingredients: Water, Glycerin, Dihydroxyacetone, Isopropyl Palmitate, Dimethicone, Glycol Stearate, Stearic Acid, PEG 100 Stearate, Palmitic Acid, Hydroxyethyl Acrylate/Sodium Acryloyldimethyl Taurate Copolymer, Glyceryl Stearate, Sodium Hydroxypropyl Starch Phosphate, Dimethiconol, Caprylyl Glycol, Isohexadecane, Cetyl Alcohol, Fragrance, Stearamide AMP, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Triolein, Polysorbate 60, Myristic Acid, Sorbitan Isostearate, Phenoxyethanol, Citric Acid, Tocopherol, Disodium EDTA, Caramel, Maltodextrin, CI 16255, CI 47005.
long_description:
Dove Summer Glow Gradual Self Tanner Body Lotion Medium to Dark lets you bask in that holiday glow all year round, without exposing your skin to the sun. Quickly absorbed, our body lotion hydrates deep into your skin, leaving it feeling soft and moisturised as tanning agents gradually build sun-kissed colour.

Our nourishing self tanner is also enriched with ceramide restoring serum to strengthen the skin's barrier and help it retain more moisture, leaving your skin beautifully radiant and nourished for 24 hours.

To get the most from this tanning lotion, start by exfoliating your skin, as a smooth surface will help you achieve a more even finish. Massage evenly over clean, dry skin using circular motions. Allow the lotion to absorb into your skin before getting dressed and remember to wash your hands once you finish. It's a subtle and nourishing way to build a natural-looking tan. Apply every day to keep your glow topped up.

Planning on spending time in the sun? Apply a separate sunscreen product on top once this self-tan lotion has soaked in and your skin is dry. For a sun-kissed look all year round and sumptuously soft skin, reach for this sunshine-in-a-bottle tanning lotion to add a summer glow, whatever the weather.

Dove does not test on animals anywhere in the world and all our skin care products are cruelty-free accredited by PETA. Dove Summer Glow is a certified vegan lotion and bottles are made with 50% recycled plastic. Since 2004, Dove has been building self-esteem and confidence in young people - and by 2030, we will have helped a quarter of a billion young people reach their full potential through our educational programs and resources.
  • Dove Summer Glow Gradual Self Tanner Body Lotion Medium to Dark gives your skin a natural-looking, sun-kissed radiance from first use

  • Our gradual tanning lotion builds a beautiful medium to dark colour for a healthy-looking summer glow

  • This moisturising self-tan body lotion contains fast-absorbing moisturisers for nourishing skin care

  • Our gradual tanner is made with ceramide restoring serum to help your skin retain more moisture

  • This tanning lotion provides 24-hour moisturisation to leave your skin beautifully soft and smooth

  • This self-tan lotion is PETA-certified vegan and made with a bottle that has 50% recycled plastic.
name: Summer Glow Gradual Self Tanner Body Lotion Medium To Dark

(F.I.L. B264237/1). Please be aware that ingredient lists for the products of our brand are updated regularly. Please refer to the ingredient list on your product package for the most up to date list of ingredients to ensure it is suitable to your personal use.
long_description:
L'Oreal Paris Revitalift Laser Pure Retinol Night Serum is our most potent, highest concentration of pure Retinol. Validated with dermatologists, the powerful formula is scientifically proven to visibly reduce 100% of wrinkles, even deep ones* Known to be highly effective and fast-acting in correcting deep wrinkles and signs of ageing, pure Retinol is a top dermatologist-recommended ingredient which helps to renew skin overnight. It is proven to fight stubborn signs of ageing like deep wrinkles, age spots and uneven skin texture. WHAT IS PURE RETINOL? Dermatologists recommend Pure Retinol because it is the most researched, potent and effective form. With many retinols available in skincare, always look for those that say PURE. 0.2% Pure Retinol is an optimal concentration that has been dermatologist-validated for fast, visible results. WHY CHOSE PURE RETINOL? Not all PURE Retinols are created equally. As an ingredient, Pure Retinol is known to degrade and lose potency when exposed to air and light, causing it to be less effective over time - in fact, many products lose significant Retinol concentration before even opening the bottle. Which is why L'Oreal Paris's exclusive international patent-pending technology, RETINOL GUARD , has been developed to stabilise and protect the Retinol, so it is potent & effective from the first to the very last drop. When using Retinol, remember to always use a facial sunscreen or broad spectrum SPF moisturiser as Retinol sensitises your skin to UV rays. Your skin will need time to get used to this powerful ingredient too, so it is recommended to introduce it gradually and use only at night. *Cosmeto-clinical study on 49 women: scoring of face wrinkles at 4 months.
  • Visibly reduces all wrinkles, even deep, for 100%* of women

  • Validated with dermatologists for scientfically proven results

  • 0.2 % High Potency Pure Retinol

  • Renews skin overnight

  • Skin texture is refined, looks younger and is more radiant
name: Paris Revitalift Laser Pure Retinol Night Serum

long_description:
Garnier Skin Active AHA + BHA Charcoal Anti-Imperfection Serum is powered by 4% [Niacinamide + AHA + BHA + Charcoal] to visibly reduce pimples, the appearance of marks & imperfections, and improve skin texture for smoother and more even looking skin. Designed for those with oily, acne-prone skin.

Scientifically proven to visibly reduce imperfections by 35% in 4 weeks*. Immediately after 1 use, skin feels smoother and mattified**. In 28 days, pimples, blackheads, pores, residual marks, and redness appears reduced**.

Our formula is vegan and dermatologically tested to be suitable for those with sensitive skin. This lightweight, fast-absorbing black formula rubs in clear and leaves no residue. The Skin Active AHA + BHA Charcoal Anti-Imperfection Serum is officially approved by Cruelty-Free International under the leaping bunny program.

*Cosmeto-clinical test, 43 volunteers, twice daily application for 28 days.
**Consumer test, 155 volunteers.
  • Powerful formula with 4% [Niacinamide + AHA + BHA + Charcoal].

  • Helps to visibly reduce pimples, the appearance of marks & imperfections, and improve skin texture for smoother and more even looking skin.

  • Scientifically proven to reduce imperfections by 35%* in 4 weeks.*Cosmeto-clinical test, 43 volunteers, twice daily application for 28 days.

  • Our formula is vegan, dermatologically tested, and gentle to be suitable for those with sensitive skin.

  • Lightweight, fast-absorbing formula leaves no residue and immediately rubs in clear.

L'Oreal Paris Age Perfect Cell Renewal Midnight Serum is a new-generation anti-ageing serum inspired by the science of mother cells. Formulated with an exclusive Antioxidant Recovery Complex, Midnight Serum is enriched with the combination of 2 powerful antioxidants; Neohesperidin & Vitamin E that work to protect skin cells against free radical damage and encourage intense cell regeneration at night, when the skin is most receptive to repair.Mother cells, the source of all new skin cells, become less active as we age meaning fewer new cells are created. Their optimal activity occurs at night, with the peak starting at midnight. Midnight Serum has been formulated to help stimulate intense cell regeneration at the peak effectiveness of mother cells leaving you to wake up to millions new skin cells for younger looking skin. Effective on all skin types and tones.Made without parabens or mineral oil, this serum is allergy tested - suitable for even sensitive skin.The next morning skin is deeply hydrated and appears well-rested. After 1 week skin appears younger, brighter and more luminous.After 4 weeks wrinkles are reduced and skin complexion is radiant. 84% agree skin looks tightened as if lifted.*CUSTOM DESIGNED, GLASS BOTTLE: With its sleek, modern design and gold finishes, this serum bottle was meticulously crafted to become an icon! Its beautifully etched glass provides an elevated look and uses recycled and recyclable glass material. *self-assessment on 106 women, after 4 weeks.

description: Q+A VITAMIN C BRIGHTENING SERUM 30ML
ingredients:
Vitamin C
Sometimes referred to as an anti-ageing powerhouse, Vitamin C is a potent antioxidant which can help to brighten skin, even out skin tone, boost collagen production and reduce the appearance of fine lines. Whilst Vitamin C can become unstable when exposed to sunlight, water and air, changing colour and reducing its effectiveness, Q+A uses a special encapsulation to keep it highly stable and your skin reaping the benefits until the bottle runs out!

Volcanic Soil
Whilst you might associate volcanoes with unpredictable explosions of lava, Volcanic Soil is what helps to keep our Vitamin C highly stable! It does this by creating a barrier to protect the ingredient from being exposed and oxidising or turning yellow, without keeping it separate from the other goodies in this serum so you get all the benefits with each application.

Hyaluronic Acid
Don't let the word 'acid' put you off! Hyaluronic Acid rejuvenates, hydrates, and promotes healthy skin. Hyaluronic Acid is also renowned for its anti-ageing properties, making it a key ingredient for mature skin.
long_description: Brighten and refresh your skin with this antioxidant-rich and hydrating hybrid serum. The unique formula is lightweight and fast-absorbing but still provides the hydration you'd expect from your favourite daily moisturiser. Our Vitamin C is encapsulated in a blend of Volcanic Soil and Hyaluronic Acid, making sure it is super effective against dull and ageing skin, from the first drop to the last!
name: Vitamin C Brightening Serum

NIVEA SUN Ultra Beach Sunscreen Spray SPF50+ offers protection from the sun's harmful UV rays while at the beach. At the beach, direct sun, heat and saltwater leaves the skin feeling dry and tight. The NIVEA Ultra Beach Sunscreen Spray SPF50+ offers a very high SPF protection as well as ingredients, such as Vitamin E, to help strengthen your skin's own defences against the sun. All this whilst also offering 4 hours water resistance. Your skin will be protected against UVA / UVB induced skin damage and High Energy Visible Light effects such as premature skin aging. ingredients: Active Ingredients: Homosalate 10% w/w, Octocrylene 6% w/w, Butyl Methoxydibenzoylmethane 4% w/w, Ethylhexyl Triazone 2% w/w, Methylene Bis-benzotriazolyl Tetramethylbutylphenol 1.5% w/w, Bemotrizinol 1% w/w. Ingredient listings for our products might change over time with new innovations. Whilst we try to update this as quickly as we can, it's best to check the ingredients on your packaging to ensure it's suitable for your needs.
long_description:
NIVEA SUN UV Face Sensitive Protect SPF 50 is especially developed for sensitive facial skin. Formulated for those with sensitive skin, this light-weight, non-greasy and non-sticky facial sunscreen absorbs quickly, protects against UVA and UVB rays and offers BROAD SPECTRUM SPF50 protection. The light feel texture provides a dry touch surface, making it ideal for everyday use and easy make up application. Enriched with Vitamin E, an antioxidant to help hydrate, repair and protect your skin. Dermatologically tested and suitable for those with sensitive skin. NIVEA - protection that cares for your skin! The skin compatibility of this facial sunscreen has been dermatologically approved. Made in Australia.
  • Especially made for the delicate facial skin and those with sensitive skin types.

  • UVA/UVB protection highly effective against sunburn and premature ageing

  • Fast-absorbing with light skin feeling, non-greasy and non-sticky

  • Enriched with Vitamin E to help hydrate, repair, and protect skin

  • Handy 50ml tube can be used at home or taken on the go

  • Compatibility dermatologically proven.
name: Sun Uv Face Sensitive Protect Spf50

description: BANANA BOAT KIDS LOTION 200G
ingredients: Butyl Methoxydibenzoylmethane 5.00% w/w, 4-Methylbenzylidene Camphor 4.00% w/w, Octocrylene 2.00% w/w, Bemotrizinol 1.00% w/w Preservatives: Phenoxyethanol, Hydroxybenzoates Butyl Methoxydibenzoylmethane  5.00% w/w, 4-Methylbenzylidene Camphor 4.00% w/w,  Octocrylene 2.00% w/w, Bemotrizinol 1.00% w/w Preservatives: Phenoxyethanol, Hydroxybenzoates
long_description:
Banana Boat Kids Sunscreen has a mild formula that won't run into eyes and is also fragrance free, perfect for your children's delicate skin. This lightweight, non-greasy formula is dermatologically tested and provides a very high UVA/UVB protection and 4-hour water-resistance so that you can keep up with your kids when you're out in the sun.
  • Dermatologically tested

  • 4 Hour Water Resistant

  • Mild and gentle enough for kids' delicate skin

  • Lightweight, quick absorbing formula that won't run into eyes

  • Fragrance Free

  • Made in Australia.
